description: An engineer needs to plan the optimal route for the subsea export cable from an offshore wind farm to the onshore grid connection point.

nodes.task_description: Analyze bathymetric (seabed topography) data to identify potential cable routes.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies routes that avoid major obstacles and steep gradients.

nodes.task_description: Identify and map exclusion zones, such as shipping lanes, other subsea cables, and marine protected areas.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a map overlaying the exclusion zones on the potential routes.

nodes.task_description: Select the shortest possible route that avoids all exclusion zones and minimizes technical challenges.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent proposes a final, optimized cable route.
